name: Personalized Recommendation
description: Users want music recommendations tailored to their tastes and preferences, not repetitive suggestions.

name: Intuitive Discovery UI
description: Users struggle with the app's cluttered design, making it hard to find new music and artists.
example_phrase: confusing design with too many buttons

name: Conversational Discovery
description: Users want to discover music by describing their mood, activity, or preferences, not just browsing through categories.
example_phrase: I want something like Arijit but more upbeat

name: Diverse Music Library
description: Users feel the app lacks a wide range of music, leading to repetitive listening and a lack of discovery.

name: Real-time Feedback Loop
description: Users want the app to learn from their listening habits and adapt recommendations in real-time.
example_phrase: algorithmic maturity of leaders like Spotify
